benefits.description: Whole body gets very tan; effect noted after single dose a week prior, having previously used it up until October the year before.

side_effects.description: Freckles get darker and new ones can appear; moles can look a little weird

protocol_notes: User states they tan naturally very well. Described dose as '3 units' equating to ~100mcg. Most recent dose was one week prior; prior usage was until October the previous year. Noted the compound is very potent for those who naturally tan well.
